source_of_truth.release_gate: mise exec node@22 -- pnpm run verify:internal-beta

definition_of_10: No known broken core user flows in admin, member app, API, auth, access control, or AI.
All API behavior matches OpenAPI and generated clients.
No fake or estimated operational metrics are presented as authoritative data.
Owner, member, trainer, pending, revoked, and signed-out states are verified at API and browser levels.
AI features are authenticated, rate-limited, privacy-aware, medically bounded, and degrade clearly.
Production security checks, dependency audit, build, route tests, and E2E gates pass under Node 22.
External blockers are separated from repo defects with exact remediation steps.

blockers: Real Chrome opened the member sign-in page but had no active app session.
Computer Use could not click page content in Chrome and returned noWindowsAvailable.
Chrome JavaScript from Apple Events is disabled, so scripted activation of Continue with Google was blocked.
No credentials were entered and no account approval action was taken without a real signed-in session.
chrome_account_flow.next_required_step: Complete sign-in manually or provide an already-authenticated test browser session, then rerun owner/member approval and signed-in user-flow checks.

commands_run.command: mise exec node@22 -- pnpm run typecheck
mise exec node@22 -- pnpm --dir artifacts/api-server test -- tests/routes/admin.test.mjs tests/routes/ai.test.mjs tests/routes/profiles.test.mjs tests/routes/classes.test.mjs
mise exec node@22 -- pnpm exec playwright test tests/e2e/admin-api-smoke.spec.ts tests/e2e/ui-preview.spec.ts tests/e2e/member-flows.spec.ts --reporter=line --timeout=45000
commands_run.result: 11 passed, 2 failed due member-web click timeouts

browser_findings.summary: Member web click interactions hang while the target elements are visible and enabled.
evidence: tests/e2e/ui-preview.spec.ts timed out clicking Log first workout.
Live Browser session also became unresponsive after clicking the schedule enrollment button.

browser_findings.summary: Member web sign-in and preview routes emitted repeated Maximum update depth exceeded console errors.
evidence: Browser console reported repeated Maximum update depth exceeded errors on http://localhost:3100/sign-in.
Similar console noise appeared on http://localhost:3100/__e2e/schedule.

browser_findings.summary: Unauthenticated protected API calls return 302 redirects to / instead of JSON 401 or 403 responses.
evidence: curl probes against /api/classes, /api/admin/access, /api/profiles/access, and /api/ai/analyze-food returned status=302.

new_or_updated_gates.command: mise exec node@22 -- pnpm run test:e2e:ci
new_or_updated_gates.evidence: 9 deterministic admin/API browser tests passed with placeholder CI env, no .env.local, and no real secrets

new_or_updated_gates.command: mise exec node@22 -- pnpm run test:e2e:member
new_or_updated_gates.result: passed locally under real local Clerk test env before CI quarantine
new_or_updated_gates.evidence: 5 member-flow tests passed after onboarding and approval-state polish

new_or_updated_gates.command: mise exec node@22 -- pnpm run test:e2e:ui
new_or_updated_gates.evidence: 11 admin/member preview tests passed after admin workflow hardening

new_or_updated_gates.command: mise exec node@22 -- pnpm --dir artifacts/api-server test -- tests/lib/logger.test.mjs
mise exec node@22 -- pnpm run format:check
new_or_updated_gates.evidence: all matched files use Prettier code style

new_or_updated_gates.command: mise exec node@22 -- pnpm run lint
mise exec node@22 -- pnpm run typecheck
new_or_updated_gates.evidence: libs, admin, API server, gymapp, and scripts typechecked

new_or_updated_gates.command: mise exec node@22 -- pnpm --dir artifacts/api-server test
mise exec node@22 -- pnpm --dir artifacts/gymapp test
mise exec node@22 -- pnpm audit --audit-level high --prod
mise exec node@22 -- pnpm --dir lib/api-spec codegen
new_or_updated_gates.evidence: codegen rerun produced no additional generated-client diff

new_or_updated_gates.command: mise exec node@22 -- pnpm run test:e2e:smoke
mise exec node@22 -- pnpm run build
new_or_updated_gates.evidence: admin, API, and gymapp builds completed

new_or_updated_gates.command: mise exec node@22 -- pnpm run verify:internal-beta
new_or_updated_gates.evidence: secret preflight, codegen, 64 targeted API tests, build, and 18 Playwright tests passed

new_or_updated_gates.command: mise exec node@22 -- pnpm run build:vercel
new_or_updated_gates.evidence: production-env preflight skipped outside Vercel production, API/admin/member Vercel output built

quality_closures: API auth failures normalized to JSON 401/403 for clients.
Member runtime API calls centralized behind authenticated helpers.
OpenAPI auth contract and generated clients regenerated.
Admin metrics now avoid fake estimated values and include tenant-isolation tests.
Sensitive admin actions now write sanitized audit logs.
AI limits, safety policy, and rate-limit store boundaries hardened.
Onboarding, pending, revoked, auth-expired, admin bulk approval, dashboard action queue, and class empty/error states have browser proof.
CI now has deterministic admin/API Playwright coverage with failure artifacts and no production secrets.
API logs now include safe route, request id, Clerk user id, gym id, and role context when available.
remaining_external_blockers: Real Chrome account sign-in still requires a manually authenticated browser session or user-provided credentials; no credentials were entered automatically.
Full signed-in owner/member real-account validation remains a manual/pre-release browser gate separate from repo-side deterministic tests.

known_flaws_to_close.summary: Member web interactions can hang while visible enabled controls are clicked.
known_flaws_to_close.required_fix: Diagnose and fix the React Native Web press/click hang and repeated Maximum update depth errors before treating member web as usable.
minimum_tests: Run: mise exec node@22 -- pnpm exec playwright test tests/e2e/member-flows.spec.ts tests/e2e/ui-preview.spec.ts --timeout=45000
Verify schedule Enroll Now changes to Enrolled without timeout.
Verify home Log first workout routes to /__e2e/workout without timeout.
Browser console must not emit repeated Maximum update depth exceeded errors on member sign-in or preview routes.

known_flaws_to_close.summary: Protected API routes return 302 redirects for unauthenticated callers instead of structured JSON auth failures.
known_flaws_to_close.required_fix: Normalize API auth failures to 401 or 403 JSON responses for /api/* clients and keep browser-page redirects out of API route behavior.
minimum_tests: Add API tests proving unauthenticated /api/classes, /api/admin/access, /api/profiles/access, and /api/ai/analyze-food return JSON 401 or 403, not 302.
Run: mise exec node@22 -- pnpm --dir artifacts/api-server test -- tests/routes/admin.test.mjs tests/routes/ai.test.mjs tests/routes/profiles.test.mjs tests/routes/classes.test.mjs

known_flaws_to_close.summary: Food-photo AI call does not send Clerk Authorization even though /api/ai/* requires auth.
known_flaws_to_close.required_fix: Add authenticated member API wrapper or pass Clerk bearer token to analyze-food request.
minimum_tests: Add or update a gymapp test proving authenticated AI requests attach Authorization.
Run: mise exec node@22 -- pnpm --dir artifacts/gymapp test
Run: mise exec node@22 -- pnpm --dir artifacts/api-server test -- tests/routes/ai.test.mjs

known_flaws_to_close.summary: OpenAPI describes /classes as public while the server requires Clerk auth and approved access.
known_flaws_to_close.required_fix: Correct OpenAPI security/description for protected class routes and regenerate clients.
minimum_tests: Run: mise exec node@22 -- pnpm --dir lib/api-spec codegen
Run: git diff --exit-code lib/api-client-react/src/generated lib/api-zod/src/generated after committing generated updates
Run: mise exec node@22 -- pnpm run typecheck
Run: mise exec node@22 -- pnpm --dir artifacts/api-server test -- tests/routes/classes.test.mjs

known_flaws_to_close.summary: Admin class UI can display estimated waitlist/check-in values instead of backend-authoritative values.
known_flaws_to_close.required_fix: Add authoritative backend fields or show explicit unavailable states instead of estimates.
minimum_tests: Add or update admin contract tests for waitlist/check-in display semantics.
Run: mise exec node@22 -- pnpm --filter @workspace/admin run typecheck
Run: mise exec node@22 -- pnpm run test:e2e:ui

known_flaws_to_close.summary: AI coach instructions are useful but not strict enough for injury, medical, eating-disorder, supplement, or extreme-dieting prompts.
known_flaws_to_close.required_fix: Add explicit health-safety policy instructions plus route/eval tests for unsafe prompts and degraded AI behavior.
minimum_tests: Add AI safety route/eval tests covering injury pain, eating disorder language, rapid weight loss, supplements, and medical symptoms.
Run: mise exec node@22 -- pnpm --dir artifacts/api-server test -- tests/routes/ai.test.mjs

known_flaws_to_close.summary: API has CORS and auth middleware but lacks explicit Helmet-style production security headers.
known_flaws_to_close.required_fix: Add security headers with tests for CSP/frame/content-type/referrer behavior.
minimum_tests: Run: mise exec node@22 -- pnpm --dir artifacts/api-server test -- tests/lib/http-security.test.mjs

known_flaws_to_close.summary: AI rate limiting is process-local and will not hold across multi-instance deployments.
known_flaws_to_close.required_fix: Introduce a rate-limit storage abstraction and a production Redis/KV implementation while keeping in-memory storage for local tests.
minimum_tests: Run: mise exec node@22 -- pnpm --dir artifacts/api-server test -- tests/lib/fixed-window-rate-limit.test.mjs
Run: mise exec node@22 -- pnpm --dir artifacts/api-server test -- tests/routes/ai.test.mjs

stop_conditions: A command fails for a repo-side reason that must be fixed before continuing.
A required secret/provider/device/browser capability is unavailable and cannot be mocked safely.
A data migration would affect a live database without explicit approval.
A destructive cleanup, deploy, push, email, payment, or external action is required.
evidence_required_per_phase: Screenshots or Playwright traces for UI phases
execution_policy.generated_file_rule: Do not hand-edit lib/api-client-react/src/generated or lib/api-zod/src/generated. Change lib/api-spec/openapi.yaml and run codegen.

test_execution_order.name: Repository and runtime sanity
test_execution_order.command: pwd && test -f pnpm-workspace.yaml && mise exec node@22 -- node -v && mise exec node@22 -- pnpm -v
test_execution_order.proves: Execution is happening from the canonical repo root with the release-supported Node major.
test_execution_order.if_blocked: Stop and fix shell runtime with mise/nvm before release-style verification.

test_execution_order.name: Secret and production-preflight policy
test_execution_order.command: mise exec node@22 -- pnpm run preflight:beta-secrets
test_execution_order.proves: Internal beta secret posture is acknowledged, rotated, or explicitly accepted according to repo policy.
pass_criteria: No placeholder required secret is accepted silently.
test_execution_order.if_blocked: Report exact missing/rotation-required variables and do not run external delivery/deploy gates.

test_execution_order.name: Static code quality
test_execution_order.command: mise exec node@22 -- pnpm run lint
test_execution_order.if_blocked: Fix repo-side lint issues before typecheck/build gates.

test_execution_order.name: Workspace type safety
test_execution_order.command: mise exec node@22 -- pnpm run typecheck
test_execution_order.proves: Shared packages, admin, API, gymapp, and scripts typecheck together.
test_execution_order.if_blocked: Fix type errors before running E2E or release gates.

test_execution_order.name: OpenAPI codegen and generated drift
test_execution_order.command: mise exec node@22 -- pnpm --dir lib/api-spec codegen && git diff --exit-code lib/api-client-react/src/generated lib/api-zod/src/generated
test_execution_order.proves: OpenAPI source, generated React Query client, and generated Zod schemas are aligned.
pass_criteria: Generated files have no uncommitted drift unless this phase intentionally changed the API contract.
test_execution_order.if_blocked: Commit regenerated files when OpenAPI changed; otherwise fix unintended contract drift.

test_execution_order.name: API route and security suite
test_execution_order.command: mise exec node@22 -- pnpm --dir artifacts/api-server test
test_execution_order.proves: API routes, admin access, classes, AI, nutrition, progress, monthly reviews, notifications, middleware, rate limiting, and HTTP security tests pass.
test_execution_order.if_blocked: Fix failing route/security behavior before any frontend/E2E claim.

test_execution_order.name: Gymapp unit and helper suite
test_execution_order.command: mise exec node@22 -- pnpm --dir artifacts/gymapp test
test_execution_order.proves: Member app API base handling, Clerk config, monthly review aggregation, versioned storage migration, and build helpers pass.
test_execution_order.if_blocked: Fix local-first storage/API helper regressions before UI gates.

test_execution_order.name: Production dependency audit
test_execution_order.command: mise exec node@22 -- pnpm audit --audit-level high --prod
test_execution_order.proves: No known high-or-critical vulnerabilities in production dependency graph.
pass_criteria: Output reports no known high vulnerabilities.
test_execution_order.if_blocked: Patch, override, or remove vulnerable package before production readiness.

test_execution_order.name: Build gate
test_execution_order.command: mise exec node@22 -- pnpm run build
test_execution_order.proves: Workspace typecheck and package builds succeed in the supported runtime.
pass_criteria: Admin, API, gymapp, scripts, and shared packages complete their build/typecheck steps.
test_execution_order.if_blocked: Fix build failure before Playwright or release gates.

test_execution_order.name: Admin/API smoke E2E
test_execution_order.command: mise exec node@22 -- pnpm run test:e2e:smoke
test_execution_order.proves: Admin surface and API smoke behavior are browser-visible.
test_execution_order.if_blocked: If browser/session/env is unavailable, report as external blocker only after API route tests pass.

test_execution_order.name: Admin/member UI preview E2E
test_execution_order.command: mise exec node@22 -- pnpm run test:e2e:ui
test_execution_order.proves: Preview routes for admin and member flows render and interact correctly.
pass_criteria: Known member preview action 'Log first workout' no longer times out.
Known member schedule action 'Enroll Now' no longer times out.
Member web console is free of repeated Maximum update depth exceeded errors.
test_execution_order.if_blocked: Separate preview harness defects from product defects and keep a failing trace.

test_execution_order.name: Member authenticated flow E2E
test_execution_order.command: mise exec node@22 -- pnpm exec playwright test tests/e2e/member-flows.spec.ts
test_execution_order.proves: Member flows involving auth/access/routing keep working across the web runtime.
pass_criteria: Approved member schedule preview can enroll and waitlist without click timeout.
test_execution_order.if_blocked: Report missing browser/auth fixture separately from code failures.

test_execution_order.name: Internal beta release gate
test_execution_order.command: mise exec node@22 -- pnpm run verify:internal-beta
test_execution_order.proves: The repo's strongest integrated gate passes: Node preflight, beta secrets, OpenAPI codegen, critical API route tests, build, and Playwright E2E.
pass_criteria: No route, build, typecheck, or Playwright failures.
test_execution_order.if_blocked: This is the release blocker list. Fix repo-side failures; name exact external blockers if credentials/browser/device are unavailable.

test_execution_order.name: Production-like Vercel build guard
test_execution_order.command: mise exec node@22 -- pnpm run build:vercel
test_execution_order.proves: Production build refuses unsafe Clerk/env configuration and succeeds only with production-like provider-managed envs.
pass_criteria: With missing/test Clerk live keys, command fails intentionally.
test_execution_order.if_blocked: Do not bypass guardrails; configure provider-managed production envs.

implementation_phases.name: Core correctness and contract repair
implementation_phases.goal: Close broken visible behavior and API/client drift before broader hardening.

tasks.title: Fix member web click hang and render loop
acceptance_criteria: Member web sign-in and preview routes do not spam Maximum update depth exceeded.
Schedule Enroll Now click updates the button to Enrolled within the Playwright timeout.
Home Log first workout click routes to /__e2e/workout within the Playwright timeout.
Fix does not bypass real auth or preview-route auth isolation.

tasks.title: Normalize API auth failures for clients
acceptance_criteria: Unauthenticated /api/* calls return JSON 401 or 403 rather than 302 redirects.
Admin/member browser sign-in redirects still work at the app-route level.
OpenAPI documents the protected responses that clients should expect.

tasks.title: Fix authenticated food-photo AI request
acceptance_criteria: analyze-food request includes Authorization: Bearer <Clerk token>.
If token or API base is missing, UI shows manual-entry fallback with a clear message.
No Gemini/API key is exposed to the client.

tasks.title: Correct OpenAPI auth description and generated clients
acceptance_criteria: Protected class endpoints are not documented as public.
401/403 responses are documented where auth or approval gates apply.
Generated clients and schemas match the edited OpenAPI source.

implementation_phases.name: API safety and production hardening
implementation_phases.goal: Make server behavior safe enough for production-like traffic and health-sensitive AI interactions.

tasks.title: Add Helmet-style HTTP security headers
acceptance_criteria: Responses include production-safe content-type, frame, referrer, and CSP-related headers.
Local dev and Clerk proxy behavior are not broken.
Tests assert header behavior.

tasks.title: Strengthen AI safety policy and tests
acceptance_criteria: AI coach declines diagnosis, emergency triage, extreme dieting, eating-disorder reinforcement, and unsafe supplement dosing.
AI gives safe next steps and directs urgent symptoms to appropriate professional care.
Tests cover at least injury pain, eating-disorder language, extreme calorie restriction, supplement misuse, and medical symptoms.

tasks.title: Introduce distributed rate-limit seam
acceptance_criteria: Local in-memory limiter remains the default for tests/dev.
Production can be configured to use a shared store without changing AI routes.
Rate limits remain keyed by authenticated user, not spoofed IP.

implementation_phases.name: Data integrity and tenant proof
implementation_phases.goal: Ensure owner-visible data is authoritative and tenant boundaries are proven.

tasks.title: Replace estimated admin class metrics
acceptance_criteria: Waitlist, checked-in, and attendance values come from backend state or are explicitly marked unavailable.
No admin UI helper fabricates operational values.
OpenAPI and generated types include any new authoritative fields.

tasks.title: Add cross-gym isolation tests
acceptance_criteria: Gym A owner cannot read or mutate Gym B resources.
Gym A member cannot read or mutate Gym B resources.
Trainer/member role boundaries are tested for monthly reviews and assigned workouts.

tasks.title: Add audit log for sensitive admin actions
acceptance_criteria: Access grants, revokes, role changes, class deletion, settings changes, and owner-sensitive actions record actor, target, action, gymId, timestamp, and metadata.
Audit routes are owner-only.
Secrets and bearer tokens are never persisted in audit metadata.

implementation_phases.name: Consumer experience and degraded states
implementation_phases.goal: Make the app feel stable when APIs, auth, AI, or device capabilities fail.

tasks.title: Centralize gymapp authenticated API calls
acceptance_criteria: Member app has one typed helper for API base, token lookup, timeout, JSON parsing, and friendly errors.
All member app API calls use the helper unless a generated client replaces the call.
Auth-expired and API-offline states are visible and recoverable.

tasks.title: Polish onboarding and approval/revoked states
acceptance_criteria: Partial onboarding input is not lost on recoverable errors.
Pending and revoked states explain what happened without exposing privileged data.
Signed-out, approved, pending, revoked, and auth-expired states have E2E or targeted preview proof.

tasks.title: Strengthen admin operator workflows
acceptance_criteria: Dashboard identifies actionable owner work from real data.
Member access bulk actions are safe, confirmed, and visibly synced.
Class schedule actions show loading, success, empty, and error states without layout overflow.

implementation_phases.name: Release readiness and production proof
implementation_phases.goal: Make the 10/10 score repeatable instead of dependent on one local run.

tasks.title: Move E2E closer to CI reliability
acceptance_criteria: Preview E2E can run with deterministic auth/test fixtures in CI or a documented pre-release environment.
Known member preview timeout is fixed or quarantined with a narrow issue and trace evidence.
CI still avoids real secrets.

tasks.title: Production observability and runbook completion
acceptance_criteria: Errors include route, request id, user/gym id when safe, and no sensitive tokens.
Runbooks explain how to diagnose auth, DB, AI, E2E, and deployment failures.
Internal beta gate and production build guard are documented with Node 22 commands.

manual_validation_matrix.expected: Sign-in or access-denied state renders with no admin data leakage.
manual_validation_matrix.evidence: Screenshot plus browser console free of app errors.

manual_validation_matrix.expected: Dashboard, classes, members, settings, and owner actions load.
manual_validation_matrix.evidence: Screenshot of dashboard and successful /api/admin/access check.

manual_validation_matrix.expected: Owner-only data and actions are blocked.
manual_validation_matrix.evidence: 403 API response and access denied UI.

manual_validation_matrix.expected: Home, schedule, workout, nutrition, assistant, and profile flows render.
manual_validation_matrix.evidence: Playwright result or screenshots across mobile and desktop viewports.

manual_validation_matrix.scenario: Pending or revoked member opens member app
manual_validation_matrix.expected: Approval-required state renders without privileged data.
manual_validation_matrix.evidence: API access-check response and UI screenshot.

manual_validation_matrix.expected: AI features degrade with clear fallback, no secret leakage, no app crash.
Request is authenticated; if AI fails, manual entry fallback appears.
manual_validation_matrix.evidence: Network request includes Authorization and UI fallback screenshot.

no_go_conditions: Generated files hand-edited.
Duplicate app roots created.
Shared contracts duplicated in app code.
Release gate runs under Node 24/25.
Codegen drift left unresolved.
Failures summarized without exact command output.
Estimated dashboard metrics displayed as facts.
Cross-gym data isolation untested.
Admin audit trail missing for sensitive actions.
AI gives medical diagnosis or unsafe dieting/supplement advice.
Production security headers absent.
Rate limiting is only process-local in production.
Member API calls bypass auth helper.
OpenAPI says public for protected routes.
Client request errors are swallowed without user-facing state.
Food photo AI flow fails silently.
Member web visible controls time out on click.
Member web routes repeatedly emit Maximum update depth exceeded.
Pending/revoked states are confusing.
Mobile or desktop viewport has overlapping or inaccessible controls.

final_10_out_of_10_exit_criteria: All known_flaws_to_close entries are closed or intentionally downgraded with evidence.
All implementation_phases have completed acceptance criteria.
All test_execution_order gates GATE-001 through GATE-014 pass or have documented external blockers that do not affect repo-side quality.
Manual validation matrix is completed with current screenshots or Playwright traces.
No untracked secrets, local cache files, generated artifacts, or visual evidence are accidentally staged.
Final report includes score by domain, commands run, exit codes, changed files, and remaining provider/device blockers.
